name: AutoFactory risk threshold
description: Sensitivity dial (0-1) for risk-threshold approval mode: steps gate when the research agent's risk_score >= this value. Lower = more approvals. Tune up/down based on what you see run; per-step overrides live in the gates flag's {step, threshold} entries.

variations.name: Permissive (0.9)
variations.description: Only the riskiest changes require approval.
